title: Health Scoring in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger health scoring in practice judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Health Scoring in Practice is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Health Scoring in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good health scoring in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Health Scoring in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
